title: Grand Rapids · Three Years of Crime, by the Numbers
subtitle: GRPD records · Jan 2023 – Jun 2026 · aggregated by police beat

annotations.text: Most records are Local / Other ordinance reports — shown in grey, never counted as violent crime.
July 2023 is the period's single highest month for Group A crime — 1,680 incidents citywide.
Property crime peaks in summer: ~663 reports/month in Jun–Aug versus ~503 in winter.
Central 3 (downtown) carries the most Group A crime of any beat across the period.
May 2026 is the highest month on record for Crimes Against Persons — 628 reports.
